subject: feat(export): add PDF quality selector (Low/Standard/High)
body:
Adds a 3-button toggle above the PDF export button: Low (1x), Standard
(2x), High (3x) pixel ratio. Defaults to Standard. Print formats always
use 1x regardless of selection. Allows testing quality vs file size
tradeoffs on different devices.

Tags: export, pdf, ui
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pdf-export
Semver: minor

title: add PDF quality selector (Low/Standard/High)
